{link}

The link expires in 1 hour.

Click the link below to confirm your new email:

ACCOUNT_SUSPENDED.subject: Your Vinlyst account was suspended
ACCOUNT_SUSPENDED.body: Your account was suspended for repeatedly violating community guidelines (reports validated by our moderation team).
